rationale: This skill orchestrates a full skill-creation lifecycle: drafting SKILL.md, snapshotting skills with cp, running eval subagents, aggregating benchmarks via python scripts, launching an HTML viewer with nohup python, and packaging into .skill files. It reads/writes the skill directory, evals JSON, and a workspace tree organized by iteration and eval ID. Network egress is implied by the description-optimization loop which invokes `claude -p` (hitting api.anthropic.com) to evaluate trigger queries. Subprocess footprint includes python (aggregation, viewer, packaging, optimization loop), cp (snapshotting), kill (viewer teardown), open (HTML preview), and claude CLI.
